title: Peckboard Plugin Registry
description: Static index of installable Peckboard WASM plugins. Peckboard fetches this file, lists the plugins, and installs a chosen one by downloading its `url` and verifying the bytes against `sha256`.

schema_version.description: Index format version. Bumped only on a breaking change to this schema.

id.description: Stable plugin id. MUST equal the .wasm file stem Peckboard saves it under (e.g. `api` -> api.wasm), because a plugin's config and approval are keyed by that stem. Lowercase letters, digits, hyphen, underscore only.

description.description: One- or two-sentence summary of what the plugin does.

hooks.description: Every hook the plugin declares — what the operator is asked to approve before it can run. Lowercase, dot-separated hook ids.

url.description: HTTPS download URL of the plugin .wasm (e.g. a GitHub release asset).

sha256.description: Lowercase hex SHA-256 of the .wasm at `url`. Peckboard rejects the download if it doesn't match.
